title: Information Assistants | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Information Assistants
Amina IssabekHey! My name is Amina Issabek, and I’m from Kazakhstan. I study biochemistry and became an IA because I genuinely enjoy helping others and getting to know new people. Academically, I’m interested by the integration of biology and chemistry, and professionally, I see myself leaning toward research or technology. Outside of academics, I’ve been a competitive swimmer for many years. I also enjoy running, listening to Olivia Dean, playing the guitar, and simply enjoying life.
Hey! My name is Amina Issabek, and I’m from Kazakhstan. I study biochemistry and became an IA because I genuinely enjoy helping others and getting to know new people. Academically, I’m interested by the integration of biology and chemistry, and professionally, I see myself leaning toward research or technology. Outside of academics, I’ve been a competitive swimmer for many years. I also enjoy running, listening to Olivia Dean, playing the guitar, and simply enjoying life.
Lucy LiThis is Lucy. I am from Shanghai and I intend to major in Business and Marketing and Computer Science. I am a returning IA and I really enjoyed working as an IA last semester, so that's why I come back. I really like answering questions and helping others at the front desk and also meeting a lot of new friends. I like doing real-life cases where I can actually give a solution, such as a business plan. My interests include watching reality shows, movies, playing the piano, and so on. A fun fact about me is that I have 15 cats and they are all really cute!
This is Lucy. I am from Shanghai and I intend to major in Business and Marketing and Computer Science. I am a returning IA and I really enjoyed working as an IA last semester, so that's why I come back. A fun fact about me is that I have 15 cats and they are all really cute!
Lisa ShenHi! I‘m Lisa Shen, and I‘m a freshman from Shanghai with an intended major in Data Science and Mathematics. I chose to become an Information Assistant because I hope to better connect students with the Academic Resource Center and help create a welcoming and supportive learning environment. I am interested in STEM subjects, and I enjoy photography, listening to music, and exploring cozy places around the city. Feel free to stop by the ARC anytime. We’re always here to support you!
Hi! I‘m Lisa Shen, and I‘m a freshman from Shanghai with an intended major in Data Science and Mathematics. I chose to become an Information Assistant because I hope to better connect students with the Academic Resource Center and help create a welcoming and supportive learning environment. I am interested in STEM subjects, and I enjoy photography, listening to music, and exploring cozy places around the city. Feel free to stop by the ARC anytime. We’re always here to support you!
Alisa ShiHi! I am Alisa, a freshman from Shanghai. I study maths and love it! I find IA a really rewarding job as I can connect students to the ARC and provide help. I love listening to music, doing workouts, and exploring! One fun fact about me is that I really love dogs, especially the adorkable ones!
Hi! I am Alisa, a freshman from Shanghai. I study maths and love it! I find IA a really rewarding job as I can connect students to the ARC and provide help. I love listening to music, doing workouts, and exploring! One fun fact about me is that I really love dogs, especially the adorkable ones!
Amy Dagmawe TedlaHello! My name is Amy, and I’m a freshman planning to major in Neuroscience with a minor in Psychology. I value teamwork and I am open-minded, positive, and inspired by helping others. I enjoy listening to people when they feel stressed and supporting them in any way I can, so please feel free to reach out to me. Three key things about me are that I am family-oriented, faith-driven, and a homebody who enjoys calm and meaningful connections. I look forward to meeting you all at the ARC! ♥ ♥ 🌿
Hello! My name is Amy, and I’m a freshman planning to major in Neuroscience with a minor in Psychology. I value teamwork and I am open-minded, positive, and inspired by helping others. I enjoy listening to people when they feel stressed and supporting them in any way I can, so please feel free to reach out to me. Three key things about me are that I am family-oriented, faith-driven, and a homebody who enjoys calm and meaningful connections. I look forward to meeting you all at the ARC! ♥ ♥ 🌿
Hayley Zeng, Lead IAHello! My name is Hayley, and I’m a freshman planning to double major in Economics and Business & Finance. I enjoy supporting students and helping build a welcoming, connected community. In my free time, I enjoy skiing, reading, and exploring new cafes. Looking forward to meeting you all at the ARC!
Hello! My name is Hayley, and I’m a freshman planning to double major in Economics and Business & Finance. I enjoy supporting students and helping build a welcoming, connected community. In my free time, I enjoy skiing, reading, and exploring new cafes. Looking forward to meeting you all at the ARC!
Camilla ZhangHi! My name is Camilla Zhang, and I’m from Chongqing. I am currently a freshman, intending to major in Business and Finance with a minor in Data Science. I enjoy helping students navigate academic resources and feel more confident in their learning journey. I see the Information Assistant role as a friendly and supportive point of communication, and I really appreciate the welcoming atmosphere that the ARC provides through its academic support services. Outside of academics, I enjoy playing the flute, diving, and practicing Chinese Gongfu tea. Feel free to stop by the ARC and chat with me!
Hi! My name is Camilla Zhang, and I’m from Chongqing. I am currently a freshman, intending to major in Business and Finance with a minor in Data Science. I enjoy helping students navigate academic resources and feel more confident in their learning journey. I see the Information Assistant role as a friendly and supportive point of communication, and I really appreciate the welcoming atmosphere that the ARC provides through its academic support services. Outside of academics, I enjoy playing the flute, diving, and practicing Chinese Gongfu tea. Feel free to stop by the ARC and chat with me!
Zoe ZhaoHi! My name is Zoe and I am from Suzhou. I'm a freshman planning to major in Data Science. I really cherish the precious chance to help and support students to obtain assistance with enthusiasm and patience. And also it's rewarding to connect the resource with peers. In my spare time, I enjoy swimming, reading and travelling. Looking forward to meeting you at the ARC!
